title: trifolium resupinatum var. majus
intro: Trifolium resupinatum var. majus, also known as Persian clover or red clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Western Asia and the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its isoflavone content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Persian clover include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone health, among others. In herbal preparations, Persian clover is often used as a tea or dried extract, and can also be found in capsule or powder form.
